extortion.description: Baycoat is currently the largest steel coil coater in Canada. Baycoat employs a workforce of approximately 175, operating two coating lines that are capable of accommodating numerous paint systems, offering well over 1,000 colours.We are going to upload about 19gb of corporate files. You will find passports and DLs of employees, personal and corporate financial information, medical information, accounting (payment details,reports and so on), confidential agreements and contracts, NDA, etc.
